awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Jun 27th

External links

  • Awesome Sysadminstars11.9k - Curated list of amazingly awesome open source sysadmin resources.

    • Jun 23rd

    Note-taking and Editors

  • Notes'n'Todosstars0 - Write notes and todos online in markdown with tag filtering and date sorting. (Demo) MIT Python

    • Polls and Events

    Booking and Scheduling

  • Calendso - The open-source online appointment scheduling system. (Demo, Source Codestars4k) MIT Nodejs

    • URL Shorteners

  • Link - A minimal, SQLite-backed URL shortener. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-3.0 Go

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    XMPP Servers

  • jackalstars938 - XMPP server with focus on stability, simple configuration and low resource consumption. Apache-2.0 Go

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    Recipe management

  • kcalstars6 - Track nutritional information about foods and recipes, set goals, and record a food journal to help along the way. Kcal is a personal system that focuses on direct control of inputs and a minimal, easy to use recipe presentation for preparing meals. (Demo) MPL-2.0 PHP

    • Automation

  • OliveTinstars136 - OliveTin is a web interface for running Linux shell commands. AGPL-3.0 Go

    • Jun 20th

    Pastebins

  • pastystars27 - Pasty is a fast and lightweight code pasting server. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    IRC

  • Ergo - Modern IRCv3 server written in Go, combining the features of an ircd, a services framework, and a bouncer. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT Go

    • Groupware

  • EspoCRM - CRM with a frontend designed as a single page application, and a REST API. (Demo, Source Codestars771) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Jun 17th

    Blogging Platforms

  • htmly - Databaseless Blogging Platform (Flat-File Blog). (Demo, Source Codestars696) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Feed Readers

    File transfer/synchronization

  • Z-Push - Implementation of Microsoft’s ActiveSync protocol. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Zipline - A lightweight, fast and reliable file sharing server that is commonly used with ShareX, offering a react-based Web UI and fast API. (Source Codestars69) MIT Nodejs

    Enterprise Resource Planning

  • ERPNext - Free open source ERP system. (Source Codestars8.3k) GPL-3.0 Python

    • URL Shorteners

  • liteshortstars50 - User-friendly, actually lightweight, and configurable URL shortener. (Demo) MIT Python

    • Automation

  • Leon - Open-source personal assistant who can live on your server. (Source Codestars7.5k) MIT Node.js

    • Jun 7th

    Pastebins

  • dpaste - simple pastebin with multiple text and code option, with short url result easy to remember. (Source Codestars326) MIT Docker

    Social Networks and Forums

  • Nitter ⚠ - A alternative front end to twitter. (Source Codestars2.7k) AGPL-3.0 Nimble
  • Libreddit ⚠ - Private front-end for Reddit written in Rust. (Source Codestars699) AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • May 30th

    Pastebins

  • Spacebin - Text-sharing for the final frontier — Reliable Pastebin server in Golang and Fiber. (Demo, Source Codestars31) Apache-2.0 Go

    • May 18th

    Automation

  • ChiefOnboarding - Employee onboarding platform that allows you to provision user accounts and create sequences with todo items, resources, text/email/Slack messages, and more! Available as a web portal and Slack bot. (Source Codestars91) AGPL-3.0 Python
  • ydl_apistars18 - Simple youtube-dl REST API to launch downloads on a distant server. (Source Codestars18) Unlicense Python

    • Money, Budgeting and Management

  • EasyQuickImportstars5 ⚠ - A tool that helps you import transactions, invoices and bills into QuickBooks Desktop from Excel or CSV. MIT PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Aimeos - Ultra fast, Open Source e-commerce framework for building custom online shops, market places and complex B2B applications scaling to billions of items with Laravel. (Demo, Source Code) LGPL-3.0/MIT PHP

    • Games

  • MTA:SA ⚠ - Multi Theft Auto (MTA) is a software project that adds network play functionality to Rockstar North's Grand Theft Auto game series, in which this functionality is not originally found. (Source Codestars796) GPL-3.0 C++
  • The Battle for Wesnothstars3.2k - The Battle for Wesnoth is an Open Source, turn-based tactical strategy game with a high fantasy theme, featuring both singleplayer and online/hotseat multiplayer combat.
  • Zero-K - Open Source on Springrts engine. Zero-K is a traditional real time strategy game with a focus on player creativity through terrain manipulation, physics, and a large roster of unique units - all while being balanced to support competitive play. ZK sourcestars400

    • Personal Dashboards

  • Dashystars191 - Feature-rich homepage for your homelab, with easy YAML configuration. (Demo) MIT Nodejs/Docker

    • Pastebins

  • LogPastestars115 - Minimal pastebin web app that's easy to self-host and persists data to any S3-compatible backend. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • Notea - Self-hosted note-taking app stored on S3-compatible storage. (Source Codestars945) MIT Nodejs

    • May 10th

    Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • linx-serverstars17 - Simple file sharing and pastebin with API, auto-expiry, deletion keys, and web seed support. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Go

    • Password Managers

  • Vaultwardenstars8.9k - Lightweight Bitwarden server API implementation written in Rust. GPL-3.0 Rust

    • Gateways and terminal sharing

  • ShellHub - ShellHub is a modern SSH server for remotely accessing linux devices via command line (using any SSH client) or web-based user interface, designed as an alternative to sshd. Think ShellHub as centralized SSH for the the edge and cloud computing. (Source Codestars698) Apache-2.0 Go/Other

    • Document Management

  • I, Librarian - I, Librarian can organize PDF papers and office documents. It provides a lot of extra features for students and research groups both in industry and academia. (Demo, Source Codestars37) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Flextype - Flextype is an open-source Hybrid Content Management System with the freedom of a headless CMS and with the full functionality of a traditional CMS. (Demo, Source Codestars445) MIT PHP

    • May 2nd

    Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • image-uploaderstars4 - A shareX compatible image uploader built for speed with a web interface and REST API. AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • Misc/Other

  • Orchest - A new kind of IDE for Data Science. (Demo, Source Codestars742) AGPL-3.0 Docker
  • Databunker - Network-based, self-hosted, GDPR compliant, secure database for personal data or PII. (Source Codestars750) MIT Go

  • SPIP - Publication system for the Internet aimed at collaborative work, multilingual environments, and simplicity of use for web authors. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP

    Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Custom communication systems

  • Chaskiq - Full featured livechat, helpcenter and CRM as an alternative to Intercom & Drift, Crisp and others. (Source Codestars1.4k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Search Engines

    IDE/Tools

  • Lowdefy - Build internal tools, BI dashboards, admin panels, CRUD apps and workflows in minutes using YAML / JSON on an self-hosted, open-source platform. Connect to your data sources, host via Serverless, Netlify or Docker. (Source Codestars342) Apache-2.0 NodeJs

    • Photo and Video Galleries

  • HomeGallery - Self-hosted open-source web gallery to browse personal photos and videos featuring tagging, mobile-friendly, and AI powered image discovery. (Demo, Source Codestars6) MIT Node.js

    • Search Engines

  • Jinastars3.3k - Cloud-native neural search framework for any kind of data. MIT Python

    • Genealogy

  • Genea.app - Genea is a privacy by design and open source tool anyone can use to author or edit their family tree. Data is stored in the GEDCOM format and all processing is done in the browser. (Source Codestars3) MIT Javascript
  • GeneWeb - GeneWeb is an open source genealogy software written in OCaml. It comes with a Web interface and can be used off-line or as a Web service. (Demo, Source Codestars176) GPL-2.0 OCAML
  • webtrees - Webtrees is the web's leading on-line collaborative genealogy application. (Demo, Source Codestars546) GPL-3.0 PHP

    SIP

  • Yeti-Switch - Transit class4 softswitch(SBC) with integrated billing and routing engine and REST API. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-2.0 C++/Ruby

    Localization

  • Localizer - Free self-hosted open-source crowd-translating service for your product. (Demo, Source Codestars24) MIT Nodejs/Docker

    • Automation

  • Baserow - Open source online database tool and Airtable alternative. Create your own database without technical experience. (Source Code) MIT Python/Nodejs

    Task management/To-do lists

  • Nullboardstars2k - Single-page minimalist kanban board; compact, highly readable and quick to use. BSD-2-Clause Javascript

  • PiGallery 2 - A directory-first photo gallery website, with a rich UI, optimised for running on low resource servers. (Source Codestars514) MIT Docker/Nodejs

  • openHAB - Vendor and technology agnostic open source software for home automation. (Source Codestars502) EPL-2.0 Java

  • RhodeCode - RhodeCode is an open source platform for software development teams. It unifies and simplifies repository management for Git, Subversion, and Mercurial. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python

  • SocksBinstars7 - Simple and fast terminal based pastebin, with optional code highlighting. No specific client required, all you need is netcat. GPL-3.0 Python

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Gokapistars105 - Lightweight server to share files, which expire after a set amount of downloads or days. Similar to the discontinued Firefox Send, with the difference that only the admin is allowed to upload files. GPL-3.0 Go

    Note-taking and Editors

  • Joplin - Joplin is a note taking application with Markdown editor and encryption support for mobile and desktop platforms. Runs client-side and syncs through self hosted Nextcloud or similar. Consider it like open source alternative to Evernote. (Source Codestars23.1k) MIT Nodejs

    Custom communication systems

  • Freenet - Anonymously share files, browse and publish "freesites" (web sites accessible only through Freenet) and chat on forums. (Source Codestars695) GPL-2.0 Java
  • GNUnet - Free software framework for decentralized, peer-to-peer networking. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • Jitsi Video Bridge - WebRTC compatible Selective Forwarding Unit (SFU) that allows for multiuser video communication. (Source Codestars2.4k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Live Helper Chat - Live Support chat for your website. (Source Codestars1.5k) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • Mibew - Mibew Messenger is an open-source live support application written in PHP and MySQL. It enables one-on-one chat assistance in real-time directly from your website. (Demo, Source Codestars420) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • Rallly - Rallly is a free collaborative scheduling service. (Source Codestars294) CC-BY-SA-4.0 Nodejs
  • RetroShare - Secured and decentralized communication system. Offers decentralized chat, forums, messaging, file transfer. (Source Codestars1.3k) GPL-2.0 С++
  • Spectrum 2 - Spectrum 2 is an open source instant messaging transport. It allows users to chat together even when they are using different IM networks. (Source Codestars324) GPL-3.0 C++
  • Spreed - WebRTC audio/video calls, conferencing server, and web client. (Source Codestars1k) AGPL-3.0 Go
  • Centrifugostars5k - Language-agnostic real-time messaging (Websocket or SockJS) server. (Demostars5k) MIT Go
  • Friends - P2P chat powered by the web. (Source Codestars3.1k) MIT Nodejs
  • Hawkpost - HawkPost is a web app that lets you create unique links that you can share with a person that desires to send you important information but doesn't know how to encrypt it. The message is encrypted in their browser and sent to your email address. (Source Codestars844) MIT Python
  • Jitsi Meet - Jitsi Meet is an OpenSource (MIT) WebRTC Javascript application that uses Jitsi Videobridge to provide high quality, scalable video conferences. (Source Codestars16k) MIT Javascript
  • Rocket.Chat - Teamchat solution similar to Gitter.im or Slack. (Source Codestars30.2k) MIT Nodejs
  • Tuber - Peer-to-peer video chat that works. (Source Codestars317) MIT Javascript

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Complete solutions

  • Inboxen - Inboxen is a service that provides you with an infinite number of unique inboxes. (Source Codestars225) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Mail-in-a-Box - Turns any Ubuntu server into a fully functional mail server with one command. (Source Codestars10.1k) CC0-1.0 Shell
  • Mailu - Mailu is a simple yet full-featured mail server as a set of Docker images. (Demo, Source Codestars2.7k) MIT Docker/Python
  • Modoboa - Modoboa is a mail hosting and management platform including a modern and simplified Web User Interface. (Source Codestars1.8k) MIT Python
  • Qmailtoaster - Stable, full-featured, easy-to-install mail server based on qmail. (Source Code) Multiple Linux

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Mail Transfer Agents

  • Courier MTA - Fast, scalable, enterprise mail/groupware server providing ESMTP, IMAP, POP3, webmail, mailing list, basic web-based calendaring and scheduling services. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • Exim - Message transfer agent (MTA) developed at the University of Cambridge. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • Postfix - Fast, easy to administer, and secure Sendmail replacement. IPL-1.0 C
  • Sendmail - Message transfer agent (MTA). Sendmail C
  • MailCatcher - Ruby gem that deploys a simply SMTP MTA gateway that accepts all mail and displays in web interface. Useful for debugging or development. (Source Codestars5.3k) MIT Ruby
  • MailHogstars8.4k - Small Golang executable which runs an SMTP MTA gateway that accepts all mail and displays in web interface. Useful for debugging or development. MIT Go
  • OpenSMTPD - Secure SMTP server implementation from the OpenBSD project. (Source Code) ISC C
  • Slimta - Mail Transfer Library built on Python. (Source Codestars144) MIT Python

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    IRC

  • Quassel IRC - distributed IRC client, meaning that one (or multiple) client(s) can attach to and detach from a central core. (Source Codestars598) GPL-2.0 C++

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    SIP

  • FreeSWITCH - Scalable open source cross-platform telephony platform. (Source Code) MPL-2.0 C
  • Kamailio - Modular SIP server (registrar/proxy/router/etc). (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-2.0 C
  • Ostel - Secure SIP telephony setup with ZRTP encryption. GPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Social Networks and Forums

  • Buddycloud - Tools, libraries, services and a community to build user-to-user, group and social messaging into your app. Saves time. Scales up. Supports you. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
  • cartularystars167 - RSS reader, readability tool, article archiver, microblogger, social graph manager and reading list manager. CDDL-1.0 PHP
  • diaspora* - Distributed social networking server. (Demo, Source Codestars12.7k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Discourse - Advanced forum / community solution based on Ruby and JS. (Demo, Source Codestars33.3k) GPL-2.0 Ruby
  • FluxBB - Fast, light, user-friendly forum software for your website. (Source Codestars440) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Loomio - Loomio is a collaborative decision-making tool that makes it easy for anyone to participate in decisions which affect them. (Source Codestars2.1k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Mastodon - Federated microblogging server, an alternative to GNU social. (Source Codestars24.2k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • MyBB - Free, extensible forum software package. (Source Codestars762) LGPL-3.0 PHP
  • NodeBB - Node.js based forum software built for the modern web. (Source Codestars11.9k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • OSSN - Open Source Social Network (OSSN) is a social networking software written in PHP. It allows you to make a social networking website and helps your members build social relationships, with people who share similar professional or personal interests. (Source Codestars729) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • phpBB - Flat-forum bulletin board software solution that can be used to stay in touch with a group of people or can power your entire website. (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Pump.io - Stream server that does most of what people really want from a social network. (Source Codestars2k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs
  • Vanilla Forums - Simple and flexible forum software. (Source Codestars2.3k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Flarum - Delightfully simple forums. Flarum is the next-generation forum software that makes online discussion fun again. (Source Codestars11.5k) MIT PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    XMPP Servers

  • Kontalk - Kontalk is an Open Source Messenger, similar to WhatsApp (app for android only currently), including end-to-end encryption, server is based on Tigase XMPP Server. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Java
  • MongooseIM - Mobile messaging platform with a focus on performance and scalability. (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-2.0 Erlang
  • Openfire - Real time collaboration (RTC) server. (Source Codestars2.3k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Tigase - XMPP server implementation in Java. GPL-3.0 Java
  • Prosody IM - Feature-rich and easy to configure XMPP server. (Source Code) MIT Lua

    • Conference Management

  • Conference Organizing Distribution (COD) - Create conference and event websites built on top of Drupal. (Source Code) GPL-1.0 PHP
  • Open Conference Systems (OCS) - is a free Web publishing tool that will create a complete Web presence for your scholarly conference. (Demo, Source Codestars82) GPL-1.0 PHP
  • frab - web-based conference planning and management system. It helps to collect submissions, to manage talks and speakers and to create a schedule. (Source Codestars635) MIT Ruby
  • OpenCFPstars539 - OpenCFP is a PHP-based conference talk submission system. MIT PHP
  • osem - Event management tailored to free Software conferences. (Demo, Source Codestars661) MIT Ruby

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • BigTree CMS - Straightforward, well documented, and capable written with PHP and MySQL. (Source Codestars192) LGPL-2.1 PHP
  • CMS Made Simple - Open source content management system, faster and easier management of website contents, scalable for small businesses to large corporations. (Source Code) GPL-1.0 PHP
  • CouchCMS - Simple Open-Source CMS for designers. (Source Codestars288) CPAL-1.0 PHP
  • GetSimple CMS - The Simplest Content Management System. Ever. (Source Codestars333) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • MODX - MODX is an advanced content management and publishing platform. The current version is called 'Revolution'. (Source Codestars1.2k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Neos - Neos or TYPO3 Neos (for version 1) is a modern, open source CMS. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Omeka - Create complex narratives and share rich collections, adhering to Dublin Core standards with Omeka on your server, designed for scholars, museums, libraries, archives, and enthusiasts. (Demo, Source Codestars354) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Plone - Powerful open-source CMS system. (Source Code) ZPL-2.0 Python
  • ProcessWire - ProcessWire is an open source content management system (CMS) and web application framework aimed at the needs of designers, developers and their clients. (Source Codestars737) MPL-2.0 PHP
  • Bolt CMS - Open source Content Management Tool, which strives to be as simple and straightforward as possible. (Demo, Source Codestars4.1k) MIT PHP
  • october - Free, open-source, self-hosted CMS platform. (Source Codestars10.7k) MIT PHP
  • Umbraco - The friendly CMS. Free and open source with an amazing community. (Source Codestars3.3k) MIT .NET
  • WonderCMS - WonderCMS is the smallest flat file CMS since 2008. (Demo, Source Codestars345) MIT PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • CoreShop - CoreShop is a e-commerce plugin for Pimcore. (Source Codestars196) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Drupal Commerce - Drupal Commerce is a popular e-commerce module for Drupal CMS, with support for dozens of payment, shipping, and shopping related modules. (Source Codestars356) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Magento - Leading provider of open omnichannel innovation. (Demo, Source Codestars9.4k) OSL-3.0 PHP
  • Microweber - Drag and Drop CMS and online shop. (Demo, Source Codestars2k) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • OpenCart - Free open source shopping cart solution. (Source Codestars6.1k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • OXID eShop - OXID eShop is a flexible open source e-commerce software with a wide range of functionalities. (Demo, Source Codestars195) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • PrestaShop - PrestaShop offers a free, open-source and fully scalable e-commerce solution. (Demo, Source Codestars5.9k) OSL-3.0 PHP
  • Pretix - Django based ticket sales platform for events. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Python
  • Sylius - Symfony2 powered open source full-stack platform for eCommerce. (Demo, Source Codestars6.3k) MIT PHP

    • DNS

  • CoreDNS - Plugin driven DNS Server with support for proxying to Google's DNS-over-HTTPS. (Source Codestars7.6k) Apache-2.0 Go

    • Document Management

    Enterprise-class library management software.

  • Evergreen - Highly-scalable software for libraries that helps library patrons find library materials, and helps libraries manage, catalog, and circulate those materials. (Source Codestars88) GPL-2.0 PL/pgSQL
  • Koha - Enterprise-class ILS with modules for acquisitions, circulation, cataloging, label printing, offline circulation for when Internet access is not available, and much more. (Demo, Source Codestars362) GPL-3.0 Perl

    • Feed Readers

  • CommaFeed - Google Reader inspired self-hosted RSS reader. (Source Codestars1.8k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Leselysstars227 - Your very elegant RSS reader. AGPL-3.0 Python
  • NewsBlur - NewsBlur is a personal news reader that brings people together to talk about the world. A new sound of an old instrument. (Source Codestars5.7k) MIT Python
  • RSS Monsterstars326 - RSS Monster is an easy to use web-based RSS aggregator and reader compatible with the Fever API, created as an alternative for Google Reader. MIT PHP

    • Feed Readers

    File transfer/synchronization

  • Kinto - Kinto is a minimalist JSON storage service with synchronisation and sharing abilities. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Python
  • Pydio - Turn any web server into a powerful file management system and an alternative to mainstream cloud storage providers. (Source Codestars894) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Samba - Samba is the standard Windows interoperability suite of programs for Linux and Unix. It provides secure, stable and fast file and print services for all clients using the SMB/CIFS protocol. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • SparkleShare - Self hosted, instant, secure file sync. (Source Codestars4.6k) GPL-3.0 C#
  • Syncthing - Syncthing is an open source peer-to-peer file synchronisation tool. (Source Codestars36.4k) MPL-2.0 Go
  • Unison - Unison is a file-synchronization tool for OSX, Unix, and Windows. GPL-3.0 OCaml

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Files Sharingstars33 - Open Source and self-hosted files sharing application based on unique and temporary links. GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Jirafeau - Jirafeau is a web site permitting to upload a file in a simple way and give an unique link to it. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • lutimstars164 - Let's Upload That Image. AGPL-3.0 Perl
  • OnionSharestars4.5k - Securely and anonymously share a file of any size. GPL-2.0 Python
  • ProjectSend - Upload files and assign them to specific clients you create. Give access to those files to your clients. (Source Codestars690) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Pomfstars560 - Simple file uploading and sharing, source for the now shut down site Pomf.se. MIT PHP
  • Uguu - Stores files and deletes after X amount of time. (Source Codestars374) MIT PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Web based file managers

  • TagSpaces - TagSpaces is an offline, cross-platform file manager and organiser that also can function as a note taking app. The WebDAV version of the application can be installed on top of a WebDAV servers such as Nextcloud or ownCloud. (Demo, Source Codestars2.3k) AGPL-3.0 Javascript
  • h5ai - Modern file indexer for HTTP web servers with focus on your files. Directories are displayed in a appealing way and browsing them is enhanced by different views, a breadcrumb and a tree overview. (Demo, Source Codestars4.4k) MIT PHP
  • Surferstars37 - Simple static file server with webui to manage files. MIT Nodejs

    • Games

  • SourceBans++ - Admin, ban, and communication management system for games running on the Source engine. (Source Codestars214) CC-BY-SA-4.0 PHP
  • Agar.IO Clonestars2.7k - Agar.io clone written with Socket.IO and HTML5 canvas. MIT Nodejs
  • elevatorsaga - The elevator programming game. (Source Codestars1.8k) MIT Javascript

    • Gateways and terminal sharing

  • Guacamole - Guacamole is a clientless remote desktop gateway. It supports standard protocols like VNC and RDP. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java/C
  • oneye - Cloud software to access your data from everywhere with any browser. (Demo, Source Codestars86) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Groupware

  • Citadel - Groupware including email, calendar/scheduling, address books, forums, mailing lists, IM, wiki and blog engines, RSS aggregation and more. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • egroupware - Software suite including calendars, address books, notepad, project management tools, client relationship management tools (CRM), knowledge management tools, a wiki and a CMS. (Source Codestars137) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Horde - The Horde Project is about creating high quality Open Source applications and libraries, based on PHP and the Horde Framework. (Demo, Source Codestars247) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Kopano - Groupware suite including e-mail, calendars, tasks, todos and notes. Featuring a modern WebApp, DeskApp and mobile access over Z-Push/ActiveSync. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 C/Python/PHP
  • Tine 2.0 - Contacts, Calendar, Tasks, WebDAV, ActiveSync, VOIP, Mail-Client, CRM, Sales, Projects, Timetracker. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0/Other PHP

    • Human Resources Management (HRM)

  • admidio - Admidio is a free open source user management system for websites of organizations and groups. The system has a flexible role model so that it’s possible to reflect the structure and permissions of your organization. (Demo, Source Codestars129) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • OrangeHRM - OrangeHRM is a comprehensive HRM system that captures all the essential functionalities required for any enterprise. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Sentrifugo - Sentrifugo is a HRM system that can be easily configured to meet your organizational needs. (Source Codestars403) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Learning and Courses

  • Canvas LMS - Canvas is the trusted, open-source learning management system (LMS) that is revolutionizing the way we educate. (Demo, Source Codestars3.9k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • ILIAS - ILIAS is the Learning Management System that can cope with anything you throw at it. (Demo, Source Codestars247) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Mahara - Open Source fully featured web application to build students electronic portfolio. (Source Codestars77) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Sakai - The Sakai project provides a flexible and feature-rich environment for teaching, learning, research and other collaboration. (Demo, Source Codestars750) ECL-2.0 Java

    • Maps and Global Positioning System (GPS)

  • OpenGTS - Entry-level fleet tracking system. Supports variety of tracking devices and protocols. Comes with rich web-interface and reporting features. (Demo, Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
  • OwnTracks Recorderstars502 ⚠ - Store and access data published by OwnTracks location tracking apps. GPL-2.0 C/Lua
  • MapBBCodeSharestars42 - Tool for sharing custom OSM maps. Support for annotated markers, polygons, lines, multi-format import/export, multiple layers, shortlinks. (Demo) WTFPL/Other PHP
  • uMap - Create maps with OpenStreetMap layers in a minute and embed them in your site. (Source Codestars628) WTFPL Python

    • Media Streaming

    Audio Streaming

  • GNU FM - Running music community websites, alternative to last.fm. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • LibreTime - Simple, open source platform that lets you broadcast streaming radio on the web (fork of Airtimestars591). (Source Codestars461) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Mopidy - Extensible music server. Offers a superset of the mpd API, as well as integration with 3rd party services like Spotify, SoundCloud etc. (Source Codestars7k) Apache-2.0 Python

    • Mopidy MusicBoxstars388 - Web Client for Mopidy Music Server. Apache-2.0 HTML5
    • Mopidy-Partystars89 - Mopidy web extension designed for party! Let your guests manage the sound. Apache-2.0 Python

    Video Streaming

  • crtmpserver - High performance RTMP/RTSP streaming server. GPL-3.0 C++

  • CyTubestars1.1k - CyTube is a web application providing media synchronization, chat, and more for an arbitrary number of channels. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • Myflixstars264 - Self-hosted, super lightweight Netflix alternative. MIT Shell

    • Misc/Other

  • Anchr - Anchr is a toolbox for tiny tasks on the internet, including bookmark collections, URL shortening and (encrypted) image uploads. (Source Codestars72) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • asciiflow - Flow Diagram Drawing Tool. (Source Codestars1.5k) GPL-3.0 Java/JavaScript
  • Monica - Personal relationship manager, and a new kind of CRM to organize interactions with your friends and family. (Source Codestars12.9k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • ViMbAdmin - Provides a web based virtual mailbox administration system to allow mail administrators to easily manage domains, mailboxes and aliases. (Demo, Source Codestars448) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • How Secure Is My Passwordstars423 - Rather than just saying a password is "weak" or "strong", How Secure is My Password? lets your users know how long it would take someone to crack their password. (Demo) MIT Javascript
  • Musical Artifacts - Helping to catalog, preserve and free the artifacts you need to produce music. (Source Codestars57) MIT Ruby
  • Notica - Lets you send browser notifications from your terminal to your desktop or phone. No installation or registration is required. (Source Codestars225) MIT Nodejs

    • Money, Budgeting and Management

  • Akaunting - Akaunting is a free, online and open source accounting software designed for small businesses and freelancers. (Source Codestars4k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Galette - Galette is a membership management web application towards non profit organizations. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • GRR - Assets management and booking for small/medium companies. (Source Codestars40) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Inventaire - Collaborative resources mapper project, while yet only focused on exploring books mapping with wikidata and ISBNs. (Source Codestars290) AGPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • PartKeepr - PartKeepr is an electronic part inventory management software. It helps you to keep track of your available parts and assist you with re-ordering parts. (Demo, Source Codestars875) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • draw.io - Diagram software for making flowcharts, process diagrams, org charts, UML, ER and network diagrams. (Source Codestars23.3k) Apache-2.0 JavaScript
  • Leanote - Leanote, Not Just A Notepad! Open source cloud notepad. (Demo, Source Codestars10k) GPL-2.0 Go
  • Meemo - Personal notes stream with Markdown support. (Source Codestars232) MIT Nodejs
  • OpenNotestars1.5k - OpenNote was built to be an open web-based alternative to Microsoft OneNote (T) and EverNote. (Demo) MIT HTML5

    • Office Suites

  • Etherpad - Etherpad is a highly customizable Open Source online editor providing collaborative editing in really real-time. (Demo, Source Codestars10.7k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs

  • mojopaste - Perl based pastebin. (Demo, Source Codestars33) Artistic-2.0 Perl
  • 0binstars1.1k - Client side encrypted pastebin. WTFPL Python
  • fichestars966 - Command line pastebin, all you need is netcat. (Demo) MIT C
  • PrivateBin - PrivateBin is a minimalist, opensource online pastebin/discussion board where the server has zero knowledge of hosted data. (Demo, Source Codestars3.1k) Zlib PHP

    • Photo and Video Galleries

  • Coppermine - Multilingual photo gallery that integrates with various bulletin boards. Includes upload approval and password protected albums. (Demo, Source Codestars47) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • PhotoLightstars32 - The easiest photo gallery there is. GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Zenphoto - Open-source gallery and CMS project. (Source Codestars241) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Gallery CSS - Gallery.css is all CSS. Think: Simple, maintainable and understandable galleries without the use of Javascript. (Source Codestars1.1k) MIT CSS
  • sigalstars691 - Yet another simple static gallery generator. MIT Python
  • UberGallery - UberGallery is an easy to use, simple to manage, web photo gallery. UberGallery does not require a database and supports JPEG, GIF and PNG file types. Simply upload your images and UberGallery will automatically generate thumbnails and output HTML. (Source Codestars191) MIT PHP

    • Polls and Events

  • Clerkstars25 - Simple event logger to keep track of periodic events, habits, etc. as they occur. GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Proxy

  • Squid - Caching proxy for the Web supporting HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, and more. It reduces bandwidth and improves response times by caching and reusing frequently-requested web pages. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 C
  • Traefik - Træfɪk is a modern HTTP reverse proxy and load balancer made to deploy microservices with ease. It supports several backends (Docker, Swarm, Mesos/Marathon, …) to manage its configuration automatically and dynamically. (Source Codestars33.6k) MIT Go

  • Nunux Keeper - Your personal content curation service. (Source Codestars73) GPL-3.0 Nodejs

    Project Management

  • Kallithea - Source code management system that supports two leading version control systems, Mercurial and Git, with a web interface. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Lavagna - Lavagna is an open-source issue/project management tool designed for small teams. Lightweight, pure Java, easy to install, easy to use. (Source Codestars531) GPL-3.0 Java
  • Octobox ⚠ - Take back control of your GitHub Notifications. (Source Codestars4.1k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

  • Bonobo Git Server - Set up your own self hosted git server on IIS for Windows. Manage users and have full control over your repositories with a nice user friendly graphical interface. (Source Codestars1.7k) MIT C#

  • JS Bin - Open source collaborative web development debugging tool. (Source Codestars4.2k) MIT Nodejs

  • Zanata - Web-based translation platform for translators, content creators and developers to manage localisation projects. (Source Codestars286) GPL-2.0 Java

    • Task management/To-do lists

  • Restyaboard - Open source Trello-like kanban board. (Demo, Source Codestars1.7k) OSL-3.0 PHP
  • Tasksstars511 - Kanban based to-do list manager written in Go. MIT Go
  • Taskwarrior - Taskwarrior is Free and Open Source Software that manages your TODO list from your command line. It is flexible, fast, efficient, and unobtrusive. It does its job then gets out of your way. (Source Code) MIT C++
  • todostars63 - Simple todo list manager. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Ticketing

  • Bugzilla - General-purpose bugtracker and testing tool originally developed and used by the Mozilla project. MPL-2.0 Perl
  • Flyspray - Uncomplicated, web-based bug tracking system. (Source Codestars337) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • OTRS - Trouble ticket system for assigning tickets to incoming queries and tracking further communications. (Source Codestars778) AGPL-3.0 Perl
  • HuBoardstars1.7k ⚠ - Instant project management for your GitHub issues (Connects directly GitHub API). MIT Ruby

    • Wikis

  • Documize - Modern Docs + Wiki software with built-in workflow, single binary executable, just bring MySQL/Percona. (Source Codestars1.3k) AGPL-3.0 Go
  • PineDocsstars33 - Simple, fast, customizable and lightweight site for browsing files. GPL-3.0 PHP
  • PmWiki - Wiki-based system for collaborative creation and maintenance of websites. GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Tiki - Wiki CMS Groupware with the most built-in features. (Demo, Source Code) LGPL-2.1 PHP
  • TWiki - TWiki is a Perl-based structured wiki application, typically used to run a collaboration platform, knowledge or document management system, a knowledge base, or team portal. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-1.0 Perl
  • BookStack - BookStack is a simple, self-hosted, easy-to-use platform for organizing and storing information. It allows for documentation to be stored in a book like fashion. (Demo, Source Codestars6.6k) MIT PHP
  • Raneto - Raneto is an open source Knowledgebase platform that uses static Markdown files to power your Knowledgebase. MIT Nodejs
  • wikistars95 - Simple Markdown based wiki engine. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Self-hosting Solutions

  • DietPi - Minimal Debian OS optimized for single-board computers, which allows you to easily install and manage several services for selfhosting at home. (Source Codestars2.5k) GPL-2.0 Shell
  • OpenMediaVault - OpenMediaVault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. It contains services like SSH, (S)FTP, SMB/CIFS, DAAP media server, RSync, BitTorrent client and many more. (Source Codestars2.3k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Sandstorm - Personal server for running self-hosted apps easily and securely. (Demo, Source Codestars5.8k) Apache-2.0 C++/Other

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    XMPP Web Clients

  • Candy - Multi user XMPP client written in Javascript. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT Javascript

    • Feed Readers

    Peer-to-peer filesharing

  • Dat Project - Powerful decentralized file sharing applications built from a large ecosystem of modules. (Source Code) MIT Nodejs
  • instant.iostars2.8k - Streaming file transfer over WebTorrent. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • Magnetissimostars2.5k - Search engine that indexes all popular torrent sites. MIT Elixir
  • Opentracker - Open and free bittorrent tracker. It aims for minimal resource usage and is intended to run at your wlan router. (Source Code) Beerware C
  • peerflix-serverstars1.2k - Downloads torrent files and provides a direct link download or a direct link stream. MIT Nodejs
  • rartrackerstars174 - Complete private bittorrent tracker. WTFPL PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Command-line file upload

  • Beautiesstars28 - Minimalist file sharing written in Go, to be used primarily from Unix shell (e.g. with curl). Can be built as a Debian package for easy install. MIT Go
  • transfer.sh - Easy file sharing from the command line. (Source Codestars10.4k) MIT Go

    • Search Engines

    Documentation Generators

  • markdown-treestars93 - Serve a hierarchy / tree directory of markdown files. Use intended for small sites built in markdown. MIT Ruby
